name: @minsky/sidecar-bootstrap
description: Per-host gitignored sidecar bootstrap — `minsky bootstrap <host-dir>` writes .minsky/repo.yaml + experiments/ + vision.md symlink + global-gitignore registration so cross-repo-runner-v0 can govern any host repo (rule #2 — every external dep through an interface; here the dep is the filesystem layout of a host repo).
